description: Natural or legal person, public authority, agency, or EU institution that plays a role in a Scenario.
identifying predicates: natural_person/1 (label); controller/2; processor/2; provider/2; deployer/2; importer/2; distributor/2; manufacturer/2; authorised_representative/2
source articles: GDPR_A4.7; GDPR_A4.8; AIAct_A3.3; AIAct_A3.4; AIAct_A3.5; AIAct_A3.6; AIAct_A3.7; AIAct_A3.8

description: Subtype of Scenario: an AI system per Art 3(1). Set as a derived label by the engine when has_feature/has_capability conjunction holds.
Subtype of Scenario: a general-purpose AI model per Art 3(63).
A piece of data potentially qualifying as personal data.
identifying predicates: concerns/2 (1st arg); identifies/2 (1st arg); category/2 (1st arg); criminal_offence_data/1

description: Non-AI product anchored by Annex I harmonisation legislation; relevant via the Art 6(1) safety-component route.
Geographic anchor: 'eu', a member-state code, or 'third_country'.
identifying predicates: established_in/2 (2nd arg); located_in/2 (2nd arg); made_available_on_market/2 (2nd arg)
entry_into_force/2 (1st arg); application_date/3 (1st arg); applies/3 (3rd arg)

description: A reference to a provision_id in the legal database (e.g. 'chapter_ii_prohibitions'). Used by application_date/3 and transitional_grace/3.
Closed vocabulary of AI/data feature tags (machine_based, social_scoring, compute_above_10e25, ...).
Annex III high-risk use-case tag (biometrics, employment_workers_management, law_enforcement, ...).
Annex I Union harmonisation legislation tag (medical_devices_2017_745, machinery_2023_1230, ...).
Special-category data tag (racial, ethnic, biometric, health, sexual_orientation, ...).
Reified event node: applies/3 and applies_via_actor/4. Connects a Scenario, a Time, a Regulation (and an Actor for provenance). Engine-written.
Reified event: a staggered application date — links a Regulation, a Provision, and a Time.
Reified event: a transitional-grace deadline cohort.
